title: hunteria umbellata
intro: Hunteria umbellata, also known as the yellow oilduct tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in West African medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hunteria umbellata include the treatment of fever, malaria, and other infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and roots are often used to make a decoction or tincture that can be consumed as a remedy for various ailments.
